contentList.content: Skilled: You have gained proficiency in three skills. Well chosen.
Skilled: You have gained proficiency in the selected skill.
Magic Initiate (Cleric): You have learned two cantrips. Well chosen.
Magic Initiate (Cleric): You have learned the selected cantrip.
Magic Initiate (Cleric): You have learned the selected spell.
Magic Initiate (Druid): You have learned two cantrips. Well chosen.
Magic Initiate (Druid): You have learned the selected cantrip.
Magic Initiate (Druid): You have learned the selected spell.
Magic Initiate (Wizard): You have learned two cantrips. Well chosen.
Magic Initiate (Wizard): You have learned the selected cantrip.
Magic Initiate (Wizard): You have learned the selected spell.
